summary: Iteration 13 - Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 4 quick fixes verified working: 1) Logo consistency using ThemeLogo component on login/register pages, 2) Better login error messages with X-Error-Detail header, 3) Gmail+manual registration conflict messages, 4) Board member identification with is_owner and role_label fields.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails repeatedly with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - not blocking but affects real-time updates

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns X-Error-Detail header with 'Your email id or password is incorrect, please try again with correct credentials'
Backend: POST /api/auth/login for non-existent user returns same descriptive error message
Backend: POST /api/auth/login for Google OAuth user (no password) returns 'This account was registered with Google. Please use Continue with Google to sign in.'
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with existing email returns 'This email is already registered. Please try with a different email or sign in to your existing account.'
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Google OAuth user email returns 'This email is already registered with Google. Please use Continue with Google to sign in.'
Backend: GET /api/boards/{board_id}/members returns is_owner boolean field
Backend: GET /api/boards/{board_id}/members returns role_label string field ('Board owner' or 'Board member')
Backend: Board owner has is_owner=True and role_label='Board owner'
Backend: Board owner appears first in members list (sorted)
Backend: CORS exposes X-Error-Detail header for frontend to read
Backend: Login with correct credentials still works and returns session_token
Frontend: Login page uses ThemeLogo component (data-testid='theme-logo') with theme-aware logo
Frontend: Register page uses ThemeLogo component with theme-aware logo
Frontend: Login error toast shows descriptive message 'Your email id or password is incorrect, please try again with correct credentials' (not generic 'Login failed')
Frontend: Register error toast shows descriptive message 'This email is already registered. Please try with a different email or sign in to your existing account.'
Frontend: Login with correct credentials redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Board members popover shows 'Board owner' label for the board creator
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 bug fixes implemented correctly and working in preview environment
X-Error-Detail header properly exposed via CORS and used by frontend AuthContext
ThemeLogo component correctly used on login/register pages for consistent branding
Board members endpoint returns is_owner and role_label fields, owner sorted first
Frontend BoardPage.js correctly displays role_label with orange styling for owners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified all 4 bug fixes from user's PDF: 1) Logo consistency - ThemeLogo component used on login/register, 2) Better error messages - X-Error-Detail header passes descriptive messages, 3) Gmail+manual conflict - specific messages for Google OAuth users, 4) Board member labels - is_owner and role_label fields returned by API and displayed in UI. WebSocket connection issues observed but not blocking. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration13.py

logo_consistency.details: Login and Register pages use ThemeLogo component with data-testid='theme-logo', displays theme-aware logo (logo-desktop-light.png or logo-desktop-dark.png)

login_error_messages.details: X-Error-Detail header returns descriptive messages: 'Your email id or password is incorrect...' for wrong credentials, 'This account was registered with Google...' for OAuth users

register_error_messages.details: X-Error-Detail header returns: 'This email is already registered...' for existing users, 'This email is already registered with Google...' for OAuth users

board_member_labels.details: GET /api/boards/{board_id}/members returns is_owner (boolean) and role_label ('Board owner' or 'Board member'), owner sorted first, displayed in UI popover
